text:
うむ、よろしい！
やはり君は優秀なアークスだな。
杞憂で済んでよかった。

グッジョブの送信とは
お互いがお互いに笑顔になる
素晴らしい行為だと思うぞ！

Now THAT'S what I like to see, kid! You're a
regular ol' ace of an ARKS! Gotta say, this
old man has a LOT less on his mind, now.

Sending Kudos is a darn good way to get
everyone trottin' around with a big smile on
their faces!
Heh, last time I sent a Kudos... Well...
